# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

function adminDashboardReport(PDO $pdo): array
{
    $pdo->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE, PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION);

    $post = $_POST ?? [];

    $from = isset($post['date_from']) ? trim((string)$post['date_from']) : '';
    $to   = isset($post['date_to']) ? trim((string)$post['date_to']) : '';
    $tz   = isset($post['timezone']) && is_string($post['timezone']) && $post['timezone'] !== '' ? $post['timezone'] : 'UTC';

    $statuses   = $post['status']   ?? null;     // string|array|null
    $categories = $post['category'] ?? null;     // string|array|null

    $allowedStatuses = ['pending','paid','failed','refunded','cancelled','completed','processing','open','closed','active','inactive'];
    $allowedDateFields = ['created_at','updated_at','paid_at'];

    $dateField = isset($post['date_field']) ? (string)$post['date_field'] : 'created_at';
    if (!in_array($dateField, $allowedDateFields, true)) {
        $dateField = 'created_at';
    }

    $groupBy = isset($post['group_by']) ? (string)$post['group_by'] : 'day';
    $allowedGroupBy = ['day','week','month','year','status','category'];
    if (!in_array($groupBy, $allowedGroupBy, true)) {
        $groupBy = 'day';
    }

    $limit = isset($post['limit']) ? (int)$post['limit'] : 500;
    if ($limit < 1) $limit = 1;
    if ($limit > 5000) $limit = 5000;

    $page = isset($post['page']) ? (int)$post['page'] : 1;
    if ($page < 1) $page = 1;
    $offset = ($page - 1) * $limit;

    $sortBy = isset($post['sort_by']) ? (string)$post['sort_by'] : 'total_amount';
    $allowedSortBy = ['period','status','category','count','total_amount','avg_amount'];
    if (!in_array($sortBy, $allowedSortBy, true)) $sortBy = 'total_amount';

    $sortDir = isset($post['sort_dir']) ? strtoupper((string)$post['sort_dir']) : 'DESC';
    $sortDir = ($sortDir === 'ASC') ? 'ASC' : 'DESC';

    $ordersTable = isset($post['table']) && is_string($post['table']) && preg_match('/^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$/', $post['table'])
        ? $post['table']
        : 'orders';

    $categoryColumn = isset($post['category_column']) && is_string($post['category_column']) && preg_match('/^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$/', $post['category_column'])
        ? $post['category_column']
        : 'category';

    $statusColumn = isset($post['status_column']) && is_string($post['status_column']) && preg_match('/^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$/', $post['status_column'])
        ? $post['status_column']
        : 'status';

    $amountColumn = isset($post['amount_column']) && is_string($post['amount_column']) && preg_match('/^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$/', $post['amount_column'])
        ? $post['amount_column']
        : 'amount';

    $dateColumn = $dateField;

    $where = [];
    $params = [];

    $fromDt = null;
    $toDt = null;
    try {
        if ($from !== '') $fromDt = new DateTimeImmutable($from, new DateTimeZone($tz));
    } catch (Throwable $e) { $fromDt = null; }

    try {
        if ($to !== '') $toDt = new DateTimeImmutable($to, new DateTimeZone($tz));
    } catch (Throwable $e) { $toDt = null; }

    if ($fromDt && $toDt) {
        if ($toDt < $fromDt) {
            $tmp = $fromDt; $fromDt = $toDt; $toDt = $tmp;
        }
        $fromUtc = $fromDt->setTimezone(new DateTimeZone('UTC'))->format('Y-m-d H:i:s');
        $toUtc = $toDt->setTimezone(new DateTimeZone('UTC'))->format('Y-m-d H:i:s');
        $where[] = "o.`$dateColumn` BETWEEN :date_from AND :date_to";
        $params[':date_from'] = $fromUtc;
        $params[':date_to'] = $toUtc;
    } elseif ($fromDt) {
        $fromUtc = $fromDt->setTimezone(new DateTimeZone('UTC'))->format('Y-m-d H:i:s');
        $where[] = "o.`$dateColumn` >= :date_from";
        $params[':date_from'] = $fromUtc;
    } elseif ($toDt) {
        $toUtc = $toDt->setTimezone(new DateTimeZone('UTC'))->format('Y-m-d H:i:s');
        $where[] = "o.`$dateColumn` <= :date_to";
        $params[':date_to'] = $toUtc;
    }

    $normalizeList = static function($v): array {
        if ($v === null) return [];
        if (is_array($v)) $arr = $v;
        else $arr = preg_split('/\s*,\s*/', (string)$v, -1, PREG_SPLIT_NO_EMPTY);
        $out = [];
        foreach ($arr as $item) {
            $item = trim((string)$item);
            if ($item === '' || $item === 'all') continue;
            $out[] = $item;
        }
        return array_values(array_unique($out));
    };

    $statusList = $normalizeList($statuses);
    if ($statusList) {
        $filtered = [];
        foreach ($statusList as $s) {
            if (in_array($s, $allowedStatuses, true)) $filtered[] = $s;
        }
        $statusList = $filtered;
        if ($statusList) {
            $in = [];
            foreach ($statusList as $i => $s) {
                $ph = ":status_$i";
                $in[] = $ph;
                $params[$ph] = $s;
            }
            $where[] = "o.`$statusColumn` IN (" . implode(',', $in) . ")";
        }
    }

    $categoryList = $normalizeList($categories);
    if ($categoryList) {
        $in = [];
        foreach ($categoryList as $i => $c) {
            $ph = ":cat_$i";
            $in[] = $ph;
            $params[$ph] = $c;
        }
        $where[] = "o.`$categoryColumn` IN (" . implode(',', $in) . ")";
    }

    $whereSql = $where ? ('WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $where)) : '';

    $selectPeriod = '';
    $groupExpr = '';
    $groupAlias = '';

    if ($groupBy === 'day') {
        $groupExpr = "DATE(CONVERT_TZ(o.`$dateColumn`, '+00:00', :tz_offset))";
        $groupAlias = "period";
        $selectPeriod = "$groupExpr AS `$groupAlias`";
    } elseif ($groupBy === 'week') {
        $groupExpr = "STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(YEARWEEK(CONVERT_TZ(o.`$dateColumn`, '+00:00', :tz_offset), 3), ' Monday'), '%X%V %W')";
        $groupAlias = "period";
        $selectPeriod = "$groupExpr AS `$groupAlias`";
    } elseif ($groupBy === 'month') {
        $groupExpr = "DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(o.`$dateColumn`, '+00:00', :tz_offset), '%Y-%m-01')";
        $groupAlias = "period";
        $selectPeriod = "$groupExpr AS `$groupAlias`";
    } elseif ($groupBy === 'year') {
        $groupExpr = "DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(o.`$dateColumn`, '+00:00', :tz_offset), '%Y-01-01')";
        $groupAlias = "period";
        $selectPeriod = "$groupExpr AS `$groupAlias`";
    } elseif ($groupBy === 'status') {
        $groupExpr = "o.`$statusColumn`";
        $groupAlias = "status";
        $selectPeriod = "o.`$statusColumn` AS `$groupAlias`";
    } elseif ($groupBy === 'category') {
        $groupExpr = "o.`$categoryColumn`";
        $groupAlias = "category";
        $selectPeriod = "o.`$categoryColumn` AS `$groupAlias`";
    }

    $tzOffset = '+00:00';
    try {
        $now = new DateTimeImmutable('now', new DateTimeZone($tz));
        $tzOffset = $now->format('P');
    } catch (Throwable $e) {
        $tzOffset = '+00:00';
    }
    $params[':tz_offset'] = $tzOffset;

    $baseFrom = "FROM `$ordersTable` o";

    $metricsSelect = [
        "COUNT(*) AS `count`",
        "COALESCE(SUM(o.`$amountColumn`), 0) AS `total_amount`",
        "COALESCE(AVG(o.`$amountColumn`), 0) AS `avg_amount`",
        "COALESCE(MIN(o.`$amountColumn`), 0) AS `min_amount`",
        "COALESCE(MAX(o.`$amountColumn`), 0) AS `max_amount`",
    ];

    $groupSql = $groupExpr ? ("GROUP BY $groupExpr") : "";

    $orderSqlMap = [
        'period'       => $groupAlias ? "`$groupAlias`" : "total_amount",
        'status'       => "`status`",
        'category'     => "`category`",
        'count'        => "`count`",
        'total_amount' => "`total_amount`",
        'avg_amount'   => "`avg_amount`",
    ];
    $orderByExpr = $orderSqlMap[$sortBy] ?? "`total_amount`";

    $reportSql = "SELECT " . implode(", ", array_filter([$selectPeriod, ...$metricsSelect])) . " $baseFrom $whereSql $groupSql ORDER BY $orderByExpr $sortDir LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset";
    $countSql  = "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT 1 $baseFrom $whereSql $groupSql) x";
    $totalsSql = "SELECT " . implode(", ", $metricsSelect) . " $baseFrom $whereSql";

    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($countSql);
    foreach ($params as $k => $v) {
        if ($k === ':limit' || $k === ':offset') continue;
        $stmt->bindValue($k, $v);
    }
    $stmt->execute();
    $totalGroups = (int)$stmt->fetchColumn();

    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($totalsSql);
    foreach ($params as $k => $v) {
        if ($k === ':limit' || $k === ':offset') continue;
        $stmt->bindValue($k, $v);
    }
    $stmt->execute();
    $totals = $stmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC) ?: [];
    foreach (['count','total_amount','avg_amount','min_amount','max_amount'] as $k) {
        if (isset($totals[$k])) $totals[$k] = is_numeric($totals[$k]) ? (0 + $totals[$k]) : $totals[$k];
    }

    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($reportSql);
    foreach ($params as $k => $v) {
        if ($k === ':limit' || $k === ':offset') continue;
        $stmt->bindValue($k, $v);
    }
    $stmt->bindValue(':limit', $limit, PDO::PARAM_INT);
    $stmt->bindValue(':offset', $offset, PDO::PARAM_INT);
    $stmt->execute();
    $rows = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC) ?: [];

    foreach ($rows as &$r) {
        foreach (['count','total_amount','avg_amount','min_amount','max_amount'] as $k) {
            if (isset($r[$k]) && is_numeric($r[$k])) $r[$k] = 0 + $r[$k];
        }
    }
    unset($r);

    return [
        'meta' => [
            'table' => $ordersTable,
            'filters' => [
                'date_field' => $dateColumn,
                'date_from' => $from ?: null,
                'date_to' => $to ?: null,
                'timezone' => $tz,
                'status' => $statusList ?: [],
                'category' => $categoryList ?: [],
            ],
            'group_by' => $groupBy,
            'sort_by' => $sortBy,
            'sort_dir' => $sortDir,
            'page' => $page,
            'limit' => $limit,
            'offset' => $offset,
            'total_groups' => $totalGroups,
            'total_pages' => (int)ceil($totalGroups / max(1, $limit)),
        ],
        'totals' => $totals,
        'rows' => $rows,
        'sql' => [
            'report' => $reportSql,
            'totals' => $totalsSql,
            'count' => $countSql,
        ],
    ];
}
